tool.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot
tool.description: Productivity assistant tightly integrated with Microsoft 365, Graph, and enterprise workflow data.
tool.logoNotes: Official Microsoft Copilot icon asset from the owner-controlled Microsoft 365 adoption site (`icon-copilot.svg`), reused for Microsoft 365 Copilot branding. Checked-in SVG adds title/accessibility metadata, so it is source-verified on 2026-05-14 but not byte-identical.
tool.practitionerNote: Natural fit when the real value is inside Microsoft 365 workflows and Graph-connected knowledge, not just generic chat over documents. Uses the shared Microsoft Copilot visual identity rather than a separate M365-specific product mark.

dataResidency.detail: EU Data Boundary compliant; Advanced Data Residency and Multi-Geo offerings.

deployment.detail: SaaS within the Microsoft 365 tenant on Azure OpenAI; no self-hosted option.

auditLogging.detail: Microsoft Purview audit logging of Copilot prompts/responses/citations; retention/eDiscovery.

soc2.detail: Covered by Microsoft 365 SOC scope (Service Trust Portal).

euAiAct.detail: Assessed limited-risk by product category; no published vendor EU AI Act conformity assessment.

licenseRisk.detail: Proprietary SaaS; deep M365 Graph / Azure lock-in.
